title: CI: enable one test/e2e tun on aarch64
body:
We should have at least one run on aarch64 with e2e tests to ensure they work there.

See 

 - https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/28266
 - https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/28273
 - https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/28272
 - https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/28270
 - https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/28269


It is not particular urgent or critical but it would be nice to keep them working upstream

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
